summary: Video. A Fox News broadcast panel segment (a LIVE and FOX NEWS ALERT banner, a three-box anchor and guest layout, and lower-thirds 'NOEM TOUTS DEPORTATION AGENDA IN CENTRAL AMERICA' and 'NOEM TOURS NOTORIOUS EL SALVADORAN MEGA PRISON') discussing Secretary Noem's CECOT visit, then cutting to Noem's @Sec_Noem clip standing before a packed cell of detainees and addressing illegal migrants. It intercuts Noem's trip with Biden, Harris, and Mayorkas. It is a TV news and commentary clip embedding the agency video, with no music.
notable_text: FOX NEWS ALERT / LIVE; 'NOEM TOUTS DEPORTATION AGENDA IN CENTRAL AMERICA'; 'NOEM TOURS NOTORIOUS EL SALVADORAN MEGA PRISON'; 'DHS SEC NOEM ISSUES WARNING TO ILLEGAL MIGRANTS'; '@SEC_NOEM/X WEDNESDAY'; KRISTI NOEM | DHS SECRETARY
